title: The Anatomy of Bitcoin
description: A visual breakdown of Bitcoin's core components, showing how they interconnect to form the complete system.
relationships: Users on the Peer-to-Peer Network create and digitally sign Transactions using Cryptography
Miners collect Transactions and bundle them into a Block
Miners compete using Proof-of-Work to validate the Block and add it to the Blockchain
The new Block is broadcast and added to every copy of the Distributed Ledger across the network
